But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:11]][[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]][[Category:11]] [[ja:天王塚古墳 (和歌山市)]] {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 天王塚古墳 |image = [[File:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
墳丘（手前に前方部、左奥に後円部） |別名 = 天王塚山古墳 |所属 = [[岩橋千塚古墳群]]（和佐地区） |location = [[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吉礼・下和佐 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 13|緯度秒 = 24.37 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 14|経度秒 = 16.41 |omitted = JP-30 |type = [[前方後円墳]] |area = 墳丘長88m
高さ10.1m（後円部） |埋葬施設 = 両袖式[[横穴式石室]]
（岩橋型、石棚・石梁付） |burial goods = 玉類・鉄製品・[[須恵器]] |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[6世紀]]中葉 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 国の[[特別史跡]]「岩橋千塚古墳群」に包含 |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = 和歌山県第1位のarea
石室高さは全国第2位 |地図 = Japan Wakayama |アイコン = 前方後円墳-西 |ラベル = 天王塚古墳 |ラベル位置 = bottom }} The '''Tennōzuka Kofun''' (天王塚古墳), also known as '''Tennōzuka-yama Kofun''' (天王塚山古墳), is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofun) located in {{ill|Wakayama, Wakayama|ja|和歌山市}}, {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県}}. It has a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun (keyhole-shaped mound)|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} structure and is part of the {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群}} (Wasa area), a Historic Site1 {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡}}. It is the largest kofun in Wakayama PrefectureMajor kofun in Wakayama Prefecture include: 1. '''Tennōzuka Kofun''' - 88m long (Wasa area). 2. {{ill|Kurakake no Koshikofun|ja|車駕之古址古墳}} - 86m long. 2. {{ill|Ōnichi-yama 35th Mound|ja|大日山35号墳}} - 86m long (Iwase-Senzuka cluster). 4. {{ill|Ibe Hachimanyama Kofun|ja|井辺八幡山古墳}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani-yama 22nd Mound|ja|大谷山22号墳}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani Kofun|ja|大谷古墳}} - 70m long. and was constructed around the mid-6th century during the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}. It features one of the tallest {{ill|yokoana-shiki sekishitsu (horizontal stone chamber)|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} in Japan.The tallest stone chamber in Japan is found in {{ill|Ōnokutsu Kofun|ja|大野窟古墳}} (Kumamoto), at 6.48m high. == Overview == Located atop Tennōzuka-yama (approx. 155m elevation) within the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster, Tennōzuka Kofun holds the distinction of being the largest mound and chamber in the cluster. Excavations were conducted in 1964 and from 2015 onwards.[http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun], Wakayama City Board of Education. The kofun is keyhole-shaped, oriented westward, with a two-tiered mound. It measures 88m in length, making it the largest in Wakayama Prefecture. No {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}, {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪}}, or external structures have been found. The burial chamber is a double-sleeved horizontal stone chamber opening southward, characteristic of the Iwase style, with stone shelves and beams. The chamber height is an impressive 5.9m, ranking second in Japan. burial goods include {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}}, beads, glass ornaments, horse gear, and iron arrowheads. Estimated construction dates back to the mid-6th century. The map_size reflects the prominence of the {{ill|Ki clan|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造}} during that period. Designated as a {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡}} in 2016 as part of the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster.{{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} == burial Chamber == The stone chamber area are as follows: * Total Length: 10m * Main Chamber: 4.22m long, 2.89m wide, 5.9m high * Entrance Passage * Corridor Constructed with {{ill|schist|ja|結晶片岩}}, the chamber features stone shelves and eight stone beams. Drainage channels run from the chamber floor through the corridor, and scattered floor stones are present. burial goods found include beads, iron items, and Sue pottery, discovered during excavations in 1964 and 2017. == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Kii Fudoki-no-Oka Museum|ja|和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘}} (Wakayama City) - Exhibits burial goods from Tennōzuka Kofun. * {{ill|Wakayama City Museum|ja|和歌山市立博物館}} - Displays a replica of the stone chamber. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群}} * {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} * [http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun - Wakayama City Board of Education] [[Category:Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Wakayama (city)]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Special Historic Sites of Japan in Wakayama Prefecture]] '''Tennōzuka Kofun''' - 88m long (Wasa area). 2. {{ill|Kurakake no Koshikofun|ja|車駕之古址古墳|12=draft}} - 86m long. 2. {{ill|Ōnichi-yama 35th Mound|ja|大日山35号墳|12=draft}} - 86m long (Iwase-Senzuka cluster). 4. {{ill|Ibe Hachimanyama Kofun|ja|井辺八幡山古墳|12=draft}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani-yama 22nd Mound|ja|大谷山22号墳|12=draft}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani Kofun|ja|大谷古墳|12=draft}} - 70m long. and was constructed around the mid-6th century during the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}}. It features one of the tallest {{ill|yokoana-shiki sekishitsu (horizontal stone chamber)|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}} in Japan.The tallest stone chamber in Japan is found in {{ill|Ōnokutsu Kofun|ja|大野窟古墳|12=draft}} (Kumamoto), at 6.48m high. == Overview == Located atop Tennōzuka-yama (approx. 155m elevation) within the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster, Tennōzuka Kofun holds the distinction of being the largest mound and chamber in the cluster. Excavations were conducted in 1964 and from 2015 onwards.[http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun], Wakayama City Board of Education. The kofun is keyhole-shaped, oriented westward, with a two-tiered mound. It measures 88m in length, making it the largest in Wakayama Prefecture. No {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|12=draft}}, {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|12=draft}}, or external structures have been found. The burial chamber is a double-sleeved horizontal stone chamber opening southward, characteristic of the Iwase style, with stone shelves and beams. The chamber height is an impressive 5.9m, ranking second in Japan. burial goods include {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft}}, beads, glass ornaments, horse gear, and iron arrowheads. Estimated construction dates back to the mid-6th century. The map_size reflects the prominence of the {{ill|Ki clan|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造|12=draft}} during that period. Designated as a {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡|12=draft}} in 2016 as part of the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster.{{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} == burial Chamber == The stone chamber area are as follows: * Total Length: 10m * Main Chamber: 4.22m long, 2.89m wide, 5.9m high * Entrance Passage * Corridor Constructed with {{ill|schist|ja|結晶片岩|12=draft}}, the chamber features stone shelves and eight stone beams. Drainage channels run from the chamber floor through the corridor, and scattered floor stones are present. burial goods found include beads, iron items, and Sue pottery, discovered during excavations in 1964 and 2017. == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Kii Fudoki-no-Oka Museum|ja|和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘|12=draft}} (Wakayama City) - Exhibits burial goods from Tennōzuka Kofun. * {{ill|Wakayama City Museum|ja|和歌山市立博物館|12=draft}} - Displays a replica of the stone chamber. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} * [http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun - Wakayama City Board of Education] {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Wakayama (city)]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Special Historic Sites of Japan in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:New2]] }} [[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳 (和歌山市)]] [[en:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳]] [[sn:ennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)}}

It features one of the tallest {{ill|yokoana-shiki sekishitsu (horizontal stone chamber)|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}} in Japan.The tallest stone chamber in Japan is found in {{ill|Ōnokutsu Kofun|ja|大野窟古墳|12=draft}} (Kumamoto), at 6.48m high. == Overview == Located atop Tennōzuka-yama (approx. 155m elevation) within the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster, Tennōzuka Kofun holds the distinction of being the largest mound and chamber in the cluster. Excavations were conducted in 1964 and from 2015 onwards.[http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun], Wakayama City Board of Education. The kofun is keyhole-shaped, oriented westward, with a two-tiered mound. It measures 88m in length, making it the largest in Wakayama Prefecture. No {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|12=draft}}, {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|12=draft}}, or external structures have been found. The burial chamber is a double-sleeved horizontal stone chamber opening southward, characteristic of the Iwase style, with stone shelves and beams. The chamber height is an impressive 5.9m, ranking second in Japan. burial goods include {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft}}, beads, glass ornaments, horse gear, and iron arrowheads. Estimated construction dates back to the mid-6th century. The map_size reflects the prominence of the {{ill|Ki clan|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造|12=draft}} during that period. Designated as a {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡|12=draft}} in 2016 as part of the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster.{{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} == burial Chamber == The stone chamber area are as follows: * Total Length: 10m * Main Chamber: 4.22m long, 2.89m wide, 5.9m high * Entrance Passage * Corridor Constructed with {{ill|schist|ja|結晶片岩|12=draft}}, the chamber features stone shelves and eight stone beams. Drainage channels run from the chamber floor through the corridor, and scattered floor stones are present. burial goods found include beads, iron items, and Sue pottery, discovered during excavations in 1964 and 2017. == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Kii Fudoki-no-Oka Museum|ja|和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘|12=draft}} (Wakayama City) - Exhibits burial goods from Tennōzuka Kofun. * {{ill|Wakayama City Museum|ja|和歌山市立博物館|12=draft}} - Displays a replica of the stone chamber. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} * [http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun - Wakayama City Board of Education] {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Wakayama (city)]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Special Historic Sites of Japan in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] }} [[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳 (和歌山市)]] [[en:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳]] [[sn:ennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)}}

It has a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun (keyhole-shaped mound)|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} structure and is part of the {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} (Wasa area), a Historic Site1 {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is the largest kofun in Wakayama PrefectureMajor kofun in Wakayama Prefecture include: 1. '''Tennōzuka Kofun''' - 88m long (Wasa area). 2. {{ill|Kurakake no Koshikofun|ja|車駕之古址古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 86m long. 2. {{ill|Ōnichi-yama 35th Mound|ja|大日山35号墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 86m long (Iwase-Senzuka cluster). 4. {{ill|Ibe Hachimanyama Kofun|ja|井辺八幡山古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani-yama 22nd Mound|ja|大谷山22号墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani Kofun|ja|大谷古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. and was constructed around the mid-6th century during the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. It features one of the tallest {{ill|yokoana-shiki sekishitsu (horizontal stone chamber)|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}} in Japan.The tallest stone chamber in Japan is found in {{ill|Ōnokutsu Kofun|ja|大野窟古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} (Kumamoto), at 6.48m high. == Overview == Located atop Tennōzuka-yama (approx. 155m elevation) within the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster, Tennōzuka Kofun holds the distinction of being the largest mound and chamber in the cluster. Excavations were conducted in 1964 and from 2015 onwards.[http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun], Wakayama City Board of Education. The kofun is keyhole-shaped, oriented westward, with a two-tiered mound. It measures 88m in length, making it the largest in Wakayama Prefecture. No {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|12=draft|12=draft}}, or external structures have been found. The burial chamber is a double-sleeved horizontal stone chamber opening southward, characteristic of the Iwase style, with stone shelves and beams. The chamber height is an impressive 5.9m, ranking second in Japan. burial goods include {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft|12=draft}}, beads, glass ornaments, horse gear, and iron arrowheads. Estimated construction dates back to the mid-6th century. The map_size reflects the prominence of the {{ill|Ki clan|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造|12=draft|12=draft}} during that period. Designated as a {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡|12=draft|12=draft}} in 2016 as part of the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster.{{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} == burial Chamber == The stone chamber area are as follows: * Total Length: 10m * Main Chamber: 4.22m long, 2.89m wide, 5.9m high * Entrance Passage * Corridor Constructed with {{ill|schist|ja|結晶片岩|12=draft|12=draft}}, the chamber features stone shelves and eight stone beams. Drainage channels run from the chamber floor through the corridor, and scattered floor stones are present. burial goods found include beads, iron items, and Sue pottery, discovered during excavations in 1964 and 2017. == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Kii Fudoki-no-Oka Museum|ja|和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘|12=draft|12=draft}} (Wakayama City) - Exhibits burial goods from Tennōzuka Kofun. * {{ill|Wakayama City Museum|ja|和歌山市立博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} - Displays a replica of the stone chamber. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} * [http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun - Wakayama City Board of Education] {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Wakayama (city)]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Special Historic Sites of Japan in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] }} [[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳 (和歌山市)]] [[en:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳]] [[sn:ennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)}}

revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称 = 天王塚古墳 |画像 = [[File:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
墳丘（手前に前方部、左奥に後円部） |別名 = 天王塚山古墳 |所属 = [[岩橋千塚古墳群]]（和佐地区） |所在地 = [[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吉礼・下和佐 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 13|緯度秒 = 24.37 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 14|経度秒 = 16.41 |ISO = JP-30 |形状 = [[前方後円墳]] |規模 = 墳丘長88m
高さ10.1m（後円部） |埋葬施設 = 両袖式[[横穴式石室]]
（岩橋型、石棚・石梁付） |出土品 = 玉類・鉄製品・[[須恵器]] |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[6世紀]]中葉 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 国の[[特別史跡]]「岩橋千塚古墳群」に包含 |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = 和歌山県第1位の規模
石室高さは全国第2位 |地図 = Japan Wakayama |アイコン = 前方後円墳-西 |ラベル = 天王塚古墳 |ラベル位置 = bottom }} '''天王塚古墳'''（てんのうづかこふん、天王塚山古墳）は、[[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吉礼・下和佐にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[前方後円墳]]。[[岩橋千塚古墳群]]（国の[[特別史跡]]、うち和佐地区）を構成する古墳の1つ。 和歌山県では最大規模の古墳で和歌山県における主な古墳は次の通り {{Harv|発掘調査現地説明会資料|2015}}。 : 1. '''天王塚古墳'''（和歌山市吉礼・下和佐） - 墳丘長88メートル。岩橋千塚古墳群和佐地区。 : 2. [[車駕之古址古墳]]（和歌山市木ノ本） - 墳丘長86メートル。 : 2. [[大日山35号墳]]（和歌山市岩橋・井辺） - 墳丘長86メートル。岩橋千塚古墳群大日山地区。 : 4. [[井辺八幡山古墳]]（和歌山市井辺・森小手穂） - 墳丘長70メートル。岩橋千塚古墳群井辺前山地区。 : 4. [[大谷山22号墳]]（和歌山市岩橋・鳴神） - 墳丘長70メートル。岩橋千塚古墳群大谷山地区。 : 4. [[大谷古墳]]（和歌山市大谷） - 墳丘長70メートル。 、[[6世紀]]中葉（[[古墳時代]]後期）頃の築造と推定される。全国第2位の高さを測る[[横穴式石室]]を有する石室高さ全国第1位は[[大野窟古墳]]（熊本県八代郡氷川町）で、6.48メートルを測る {{Harv|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。。 == 概要 ==
{| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff;text-align:center;font-size:85%;" |+[[岩橋千塚古墳群]]の大首長墓系譜 !古墳名 !形状 !規模 !埋葬施設 !築造時期 |- |花山8号墳||[[帆立貝形古墳]]||墳丘長52m||粘土床||4c末 |- |花山10号墳||[[前方後円墳]]||墳丘長44m||粘土槨
竪穴式石室||5c前半 |- |花山6号墳||前方後円墳||墳丘長60m||横穴式石室||5c末 |- |[[大谷山22号墳]]||前方後円墳||墳丘長68m||岩橋型横穴式石室||6c前半 |- |[[大日山35号墳]]||前方後円墳||墳丘長86m||岩橋型横穴式石室||6c前半 |- |'''天王塚古墳'''||前方後円墳||墳丘長88m||岩橋型横穴式石室||6c中葉 |- |寺内57号墳||[[円墳]]||直径35-40m||岩橋型横穴式石室||6c後半 |- |[[井辺1号墳]]||[[方墳]]||一辺35m||岩橋型横穴式石室||6c末-7c初頭 |}
和歌山県北西部、[[紀の川]]河口部の[[和歌山平野]]の岩橋山塊に営造された[[岩橋千塚古墳群]]のうち、山塊最高所（天王塚山山頂、標高約155メートル）に築造された古墳で{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}、古墳群中では墳丘・石室とも最大規模である{{Sfn|和佐古墳群（平凡社）|1983}}。これまでに[[1964年]]（[[昭和]]39年）および[[2015年]]度（[[平成]]27年度）以降に発掘調査が実施されている{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 墳形は前方後円形で、前方部を西方向に向ける{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。墳丘は2段築成{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。墳丘長は88メートルを測り、和歌山県では最大規模になる{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。墳丘外表で[[葺石]]・[[埴輪]]は検出されておらず、[[造出]]・基壇等の外表施設も認められていない{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。埋葬施設は後円部における両袖式の[[横穴式石室]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。岩橋千塚古墳群に特徴的な岩橋型横穴式石室で、玄室に石棚・石梁を伴う。特に石室高さが5.9メートルと非常に高く、全国では第2位の規模になる。副葬品としては[[須恵器]]（TK10-MT85型式期）・玉類・ガラス小玉・馬具・鉄鏃などが検出されている[http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ 天王塚古墳]（和歌山市教育委員会「和歌山市の文化財」）。。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]]後期の[[6世紀]]中葉頃と推定される{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。当時は全国的にも大型古墳の築造が減少する時期であるため、築造の背景として古代豪族の[[紀伊国造|紀氏]]の繁栄の様子が指摘される{{Sfn|発掘調査現地説明会資料|2015}}。 古墳域は[[2016年]]（平成28年）に国の[[特別史跡]]に指定されている（特別史跡「岩橋千塚古墳群」に追加指定）{{国指定文化財等データベース|401|2070|岩橋千塚古墳群}}。 == 遺跡歴 == * [[1906年]]（[[明治]]39年）、徳川頼倫による調査{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。 * [[1907年]]（明治40年）、石室調査（[[東京帝国大学]]人類学教室の大野雲外）{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 * [[1908年]]（明治41年）、[[ニール・ゴードン・マンロー]]の"Prehistoric Japan"に石室図面掲載{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 * [[1912年]]（明治45年）の2ヶ月間、石室内部公開{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 * [[1964年]]（[[昭和]]39年）、発掘調査（和歌山市教育委員会・[[関西大学]]、[[1967年]]に報告書刊行）{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。 * [[2015年]]度（[[平成]]27年度）、史跡指定に向けた範囲確認測量・発掘調査：第1次調査（和歌山県教育委員会、[[2016年]]に報告書刊行）{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。 * 2016年（平成28年） ** 2月1日、遺跡名称を「天王塚山古墳」から「天王塚古墳」に変更{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016}}。 ** 10月3日、国の[[特別史跡]]に指定（特別史跡「[[岩橋千塚古墳群]]」に追加指定）[https://web.archive.org/web/20160622173820/http://www.bunka.go.jp/koho_hodo_oshirase/hodohappyo/2016061701.html 史跡等の指定等について]（文化庁報道発表、2016年6月17日）。。 * [[2017年|2017]]-[[2018年]]度（平成29-30年度）、史跡整備に向けた発掘調査：第2・3次調査（[[和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘]]・和歌山県教育委員会、[[2020年]]に報告書刊行）{{Sfn|天王塚古墳 2次・3次発掘調査報告書|2020}}{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 == 墳丘 == 墳丘の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 * 墳丘長：88メートル * 後円部 - 2段築成。 ** 直径：約44-48メートル ** 高さ：10.1メートル * 前方部 - 2段築成。 墳丘の構築は、1段目の大部分においては岩盤整形により、2段目以上においては盛土による{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。盛土は地山の削り出しによるとされ、盛土中に[[弥生時代]]の土器・石器が認められることから、山頂付近では弥生時代に集落が存在したと推測される{{Sfn|発掘調査現地説明会資料|2015}}。また墳丘全体として[[葺石]]・[[造出]]・基壇・周濠・[[埴輪]]を伴わないという、時代が下る時期の特色を示す{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), kouenbu.jpg|前方部から後円部を望む Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), zenpoubu.jpg|後円部側から前方部を望む Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), funkyu-trench-2.jpg|後円部墳丘トレンチ
{{small|2018年調査時。墳丘下半では岩盤整形が認められる。}} == 埋葬施設 == [[File:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), replica 3D-B.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石室レプリカ俯瞰図}}]] [[File:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), replica 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石室レプリカ展開図}}]] 埋葬施設としては、後円部において両袖式[[横穴式石室]]が構築されており、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。石室の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|和佐古墳群（平凡社）|1983}}。 * 石室全長：10メートル * 玄室：長さ4.22メートル、幅2.89メートル、高さ5.9メートル * 玄室前道（通廊） * 羨道 石室の石材は[[結晶片岩]]{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。玄室には石棚（1箇所2枚）・石梁8本を伴い、岩橋千塚古墳群で特徴的な岩橋型横穴式石室になる{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。玄室は岩盤上に構築され、岩盤床面では中央部・両側壁側に排水溝が構築される{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。この排水溝は羨道を通って墳丘外まで続く{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。また玄室床面には板石が散在する{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 石室内は盗掘に遭っているが、1964年（昭和39年）調査および2017年度（平成29年度）調査の際に、石室内の副葬品として玉類・鉄製品・須恵器などが検出されている{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), genshitsu-1.jpg|玄室 奥壁
{{small|中央に石棚2枚、上に石梁1本。2018年調査時。}} Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), genshitsu-2.jpg|玄室 上方
{{small|最奥に天井石。手前の左右側壁に多くの石梁を渡す。}} Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), genmon.jpg|玄室 玄門
{{small|奥に玄室前道・羨道。2018年調査時。}} Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), sendou.jpg|羨道
{{small|奥に玄室前道・玄室。2018年調査時。}} Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), senmon.jpg|羨門
{{small|2018年調査時。}} 天王塚古墳 (和歌山市) 出土品 (紀伊風土記の丘展示2023).JPG|出土品
{{small|[[和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘]]企画展示時に撮影。}} 伝天王塚古墳 (和歌山市) 出土 須恵器 有蓋台付壺.JPG|伝出土 須恵器 有蓋台付壺
{{small|和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘展示。}} 天王塚古墳 (和歌山市) 出土 玉類.JPG|玉類
{{small|和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘企画展示時に撮影。}} == 関連施設 == * [[和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘]]（和歌山市岩橋） - 天王塚古墳の出土品を保管・展示。 * [[和歌山市立博物館]]（和歌山市湊本町） - 天王塚古墳の石室レプリカを展示。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} '''注釈''' {{reflist|group="注"}} '''出典''' {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * 地方自治体発行 ** 発掘調査報告書 *** {{Cite book|和書|editor=[[関西大学]]文学部考古学研究室|author=|year=1967|chapter=|title=岩橋千塚|publisher=和歌山市教育委員会|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|岩橋千塚|1967}}}} *** {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2016|chapter=|title=大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳 -特別史跡岩橋千塚古墳群追加指定に伴う発掘調査報告書-|publisher=和歌山県教育委員会|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016}}}} *** {{Cite book|和書|editor=和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘|author=|year=2020|chapter=|title=特別史跡 岩橋千塚古墳群 -天王塚古墳 2次・3次発掘調査報告書-|publisher=和歌山県教育委員会|url=https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/139273|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|天王塚古墳 2次・3次発掘調査報告書|2020}}}} - リンクは奈良文化財研究所「全国遺跡報告総覧」。 ** 現地説明会資料 *** {{Wikicite|reference={{PDFlink|[http://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/haihu.pdf 天王塚山古墳発掘調査現地説明会資料]}}（和歌山県庁生涯学習局文化遺産課、2015年）|ref={{Harvid|発掘調査現地説明会資料|2015}}}} - リンクは和歌山県ホームページ。 *** {{Wikicite|reference={{PDFlink|[http://www.kiifudoki.wakayama-c.ed.jp/gennsetu/gennsetusiryou.pdf 天王塚古墳第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料]}}（和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘、2018年）|ref={{Harvid|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}}} - リンクは紀伊風土記の丘ホームページ。 * 事典類 ** {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1983|chapter=和佐古墳群|title=和歌山県の地名|series=[[日本歴史地名大系]]31|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=458249031X|ref={{Harvid|和佐古墳群（平凡社）|1983}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=丹野拓・米田文孝|year=2018|chapter=|title=紀国造家の実像をさぐる 岩橋千塚古墳群|series=シリーズ「遺跡を学ぶ」126|publisher=新泉社|isbn=9784787718365|ref=}} == 外部リンク== {{Commonscat|Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)}} * {{国指定文化財等データベース|401|2070|岩橋千塚古墳群}} * [http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ 天王塚古墳] - 和歌山市教育委員会「和歌山市の文化財」 {{デフォルトソート:てんのうつかこふん わかやまし}} [[Category:岩橋千塚古墳群]] [[Category:和歌山県の古墳]] [[Category:和歌山市の歴史]] [[Category:前方後円墳]] [[Category:和歌山県にある国指定の史跡]]

{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 天王塚古墳 |image = [[File:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
墳丘（手前に前方部、左奥に後円部） |alternate_name = 天王塚山古墳 |所属 = [[岩橋千塚古墳群]]（和佐地区） |location = [[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吉礼・下和佐 |coordinates = 34|coordinates = 13|coordinates = 24.37 |coordinates =135|coordinates = 14|coordinates = 16.41 |omitted = JP-30 |type = [[前方後円墳]] |area = 墳丘長88m
高さ10.1m（後円部） |Burial Facility = 両袖式[[横穴式石室]]
（岩橋型、石棚・石梁付） |burial goods = 玉類・鉄製品・[[須恵器]] |陪塚 = |built = [[6世紀]]中葉 |Interred Persons = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 国の[[特別史跡]]「岩橋千塚古墳群」に包含 |有形文化財 = |Special Notes = 和歌山県第1位のarea
石室高さは全国第2位 |地図 = Japan Wakayama |アイコン = 前方後円墳-西 |ラベル = 天王塚古墳 |ラベル位置 = bottom }} The '''Tennōzuka Kofun''' (天王塚古墳), also known as '''Tennōzuka-yama Kofun''' (天王塚山古墳), is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} (ancient Kofun) located in {{ill|Wakayama, Wakayama|ja|和歌山市|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|12=draft|12=draft}}. It has a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun (keyhole-shaped mound)|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} structure and is part of the {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} (Wasa area), a Historic Site1 {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is the largest kofun in Wakayama PrefectureMajor kofun in Wakayama Prefecture include: 1. '''Tennōzuka Kofun''' - 88m long (Wasa area). 2. {{ill|Kurakake no Koshikofun|ja|車駕之古址古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 86m long. 2. {{ill|Ōnichi-yama 35th Mound|ja|大日山35号墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 86m long (Iwase-Senzuka cluster). 4. {{ill|Ibe Hachimanyama Kofun|ja|井辺八幡山古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani-yama 22nd Mound|ja|大谷山22号墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani Kofun|ja|大谷古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. and was constructed around the mid-6th century during the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. It features one of the tallest {{ill|yokoana-shiki sekishitsu (horizontal stone chamber)|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}} in Japan.The tallest stone chamber in Japan is found in {{ill|Ōnokutsu Kofun|ja|大野窟古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} (Kumamoto), at 6.48m high. == Overview == Located atop Tennōzuka-yama (approx. 155m elevation) within the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster, Tennōzuka Kofun holds the distinction of being the largest mound and chamber in the cluster. Excavations were conducted in 1964 and from 2015 onwards.[http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun], Wakayama City Board of Education. The kofun is keyhole-shaped, oriented westward, with a two-tiered mound. It measures 88m in length, making it the largest in Wakayama Prefecture. No {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|12=draft|12=draft}}, or external structures have been found. The burial chamber is a double-sleeved horizontal stone chamber opening southward, characteristic of the Iwase style, with stone shelves and beams. The chamber height is an impressive 5.9m, ranking second in Japan. burial goods include {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft|12=draft}}, beads, glass ornaments, horse gear, and iron arrowheads. Estimated construction dates back to the mid-6th century. The map_size reflects the prominence of the {{ill|Ki clan|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造|12=draft|12=draft}} during that period. Designated as a {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡|12=draft|12=draft}} in 2016 as part of the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster.{{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} == burial Chamber == The stone chamber area are as follows: * Total Length: 10m * Main Chamber: 4.22m long, 2.89m wide, 5.9m high * Entrance Passage * Corridor Constructed with {{ill|schist|ja|結晶片岩|12=draft|12=draft}}, the chamber features stone shelves and eight stone beams. Drainage channels run from the chamber floor through the corridor, and scattered floor stones are present. burial goods found include beads, iron items, and Sue pottery, discovered during excavations in 1964 and 2017. == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Kii Fudoki-no-Oka Museum|ja|和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘|12=draft|12=draft}} (Wakayama City) - Exhibits burial goods from Tennōzuka Kofun. * {{ill|Wakayama City Museum|ja|和歌山市立博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} - Displays a replica of the stone chamber. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} * [http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun - Wakayama City Board of Education] {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Wakayama (city)]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Special Historic Sites of Japan in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] }} [[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳 (和歌山市)]] [[en:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳]] [[sn:ennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)}}

高さ10.1m（後円部） |Burial Facility = 両袖式[[横穴式石室]]
（岩橋型、石棚・石梁付） |burial goods = 玉類・鉄製品・[[須恵器]] |陪塚 = |built = [[6世紀]]中葉 |Interred Persons = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 国の[[特別史跡]]「岩橋千塚古墳群」に包含 |有形文化財 = |Special Notes = 和歌山県第1位のarea
石室高さは全国第2位 |地図 = Japan Wakayama |アイコン = 前方後円墳-西 |ラベル = 天王塚古墳 |ラベル位置 = bottom }} The '''Tennōzuka Kofun''' (天王塚古墳), also known as '''Tennōzuka-yama Kofun''' (天王塚山古墳), is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} (ancient Kofun) located in {{ill|Wakayama, Wakayama|ja|和歌山市|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|12=draft|12=draft}}. It has a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun (keyhole-shaped mound)|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} structure and is part of the {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} (Wasa area), a Historic Site1 {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is the largest kofun in Wakayama PrefectureMajor kofun in Wakayama Prefecture include: 1. '''Tennōzuka Kofun''' - 88m long (Wasa area). 2. {{ill|Kurakake no Koshikofun|ja|車駕之古址古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 86m long. 2. {{ill|Ōnichi-yama 35th Mound|ja|大日山35号墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 86m long (Iwase-Senzuka cluster). 4. {{ill|Ibe Hachimanyama Kofun|ja|井辺八幡山古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani-yama 22nd Mound|ja|大谷山22号墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani Kofun|ja|大谷古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. and was constructed around the mid-6th century during the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. It features one of the tallest {{ill|yokoana-shiki sekishitsu (horizontal stone chamber)|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}} in Japan.The tallest stone chamber in Japan is found in {{ill|Ōnokutsu Kofun|ja|大野窟古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} (Kumamoto), at 6.48m high. == Overview == Located atop Tennōzuka-yama (approx. 155m elevation) within the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster, Tennōzuka Kofun holds the distinction of being the largest mound and chamber in the cluster. Excavations were conducted in 1964 and from 2015 onwards.[http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun], Wakayama City Board of Education. The kofun is keyhole-shaped, oriented westward, with a two-tiered mound. It measures 88m in length, making it the largest in Wakayama Prefecture. No {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|12=draft|12=draft}}, or external structures have been found. The burial chamber is a double-sleeved horizontal stone chamber opening southward, characteristic of the Iwase style, with stone shelves and beams. The chamber height is an impressive 5.9m, ranking second in Japan. burial goods include {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft|12=draft}}, beads, glass ornaments, horse gear, and iron arrowheads. Estimated construction dates back to the mid-6th century. The map_size reflects the prominence of the {{ill|Ki clan|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造|12=draft|12=draft}} during that period. Designated as a {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡|12=draft|12=draft}} in 2016 as part of the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster.{{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} == burial Chamber == The stone chamber area are as follows: * Total Length: 10m * Main Chamber: 4.22m long, 2.89m wide, 5.9m high * Entrance Passage * Corridor Constructed with {{ill|schist|ja|結晶片岩|12=draft|12=draft}}, the chamber features stone shelves and eight stone beams. Drainage channels run from the chamber floor through the corridor, and scattered floor stones are present. burial goods found include beads, iron items, and Sue pottery, discovered during excavations in 1964 and 2017. == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Kii Fudoki-no-Oka Museum|ja|和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘|12=draft|12=draft}} (Wakayama City) - Exhibits burial goods from Tennōzuka Kofun. * {{ill|Wakayama City Museum|ja|和歌山市立博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} - Displays a replica of the stone chamber. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} * [http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun - Wakayama City Board of Education] {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Wakayama (city)]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Special Historic Sites of Japan in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] }} [[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳 (和歌山市)]] [[en:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳]] [[sn:ennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)}}

墳丘（手前に前方部、左奥に後円部） |alternate_name = 天王塚山古墳 |所属 = [[岩橋千塚古墳群]]（和佐地区） |location = [[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吉礼・下和佐 |coordinates = 34|coordinates = 13|coordinates = 24.37 |coordinates =135|coordinates = 14|coordinates = 16.41 |omitted = JP-30 |type = [[前方後円墳]] |area = 墳丘長88m
高さ10.1m（後円部） |Burial Facility = 両袖式[[横穴式石室]]
（岩橋型、石棚・石梁付） |burial goods = 玉類・鉄製品・[[須恵器]] |陪塚 = |built = [[6世紀]]中葉 |Interred Persons = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 国の[[特別史跡]]「岩橋千塚古墳群」に包含 |有形文化財 = |Special Notes = 和歌山県第1位のarea
石室高さは全国第2位 |地図 = Japan Wakayama |アイコン = 前方後円墳-西 |ラベル = 天王塚古墳 |ラベル位置 = bottom }} The '''Tennōzuka Kofun''' (天王塚古墳), also known as '''Tennōzuka-yama Kofun''' (天王塚山古墳), is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} (ancient Kofun) located in {{ill|Wakayama, Wakayama|ja|和歌山市|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|12=draft|12=draft}}. It has a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun (keyhole-shaped mound)|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} structure and is part of the {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} (Wasa area), a Historic Site1 {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is the largest kofun in Wakayama PrefectureMajor kofun in Wakayama Prefecture include: 1. '''Tennōzuka Kofun''' - 88m long (Wasa area). 2. {{ill|Kurakake no Koshikofun|ja|車駕之古址古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 86m long. 2. {{ill|Ōnichi-yama 35th Mound|ja|大日山35号墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 86m long (Iwase-Senzuka cluster). 4. {{ill|Ibe Hachimanyama Kofun|ja|井辺八幡山古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani-yama 22nd Mound|ja|大谷山22号墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani Kofun|ja|大谷古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. and was constructed around the mid-6th century during the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. It features one of the tallest {{ill|yokoana-shiki sekishitsu (horizontal stone chamber)|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}} in Japan.The tallest stone chamber in Japan is found in {{ill|Ōnokutsu Kofun|ja|大野窟古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} (Kumamoto), at 6.48m high. == Overview == Located atop Tennōzuka-yama (approx. 155m elevation) within the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster, Tennōzuka Kofun holds the distinction of being the largest mound and chamber in the cluster. Excavations were conducted in 1964 and from 2015 onwards.[http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun], Wakayama City Board of Education. The kofun is keyhole-shaped, oriented westward, with a two-tiered mound. It measures 88m in length, making it the largest in Wakayama Prefecture. No {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|12=draft|12=draft}}, or external structures have been found. The burial chamber is a double-sleeved horizontal stone chamber opening southward, characteristic of the Iwase style, with stone shelves and beams. The chamber height is an impressive 5.9m, ranking second in Japan. burial goods include {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft|12=draft}}, beads, glass ornaments, horse gear, and iron arrowheads. Estimated construction dates back to the mid-6th century. The map_size reflects the prominence of the {{ill|Ki clan|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造|12=draft|12=draft}} during that period. Designated as a {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡|12=draft|12=draft}} in 2016 as part of the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster.{{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} == burial Chamber == The stone chamber area are as follows: * Total Length: 10m * Main Chamber: 4.22m long, 2.89m wide, 5.9m high * Entrance Passage * Corridor Constructed with {{ill|schist|ja|結晶片岩|12=draft|12=draft}}, the chamber features stone shelves and eight stone beams. Drainage channels run from the chamber floor through the corridor, and scattered floor stones are present. burial goods found include beads, iron items, and Sue pottery, discovered during excavations in 1964 and 2017. == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Kii Fudoki-no-Oka Museum|ja|和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘|12=draft|12=draft}} (Wakayama City) - Exhibits burial goods from Tennōzuka Kofun. * {{ill|Wakayama City Museum|ja|和歌山市立博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} - Displays a replica of the stone chamber. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} * [http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun - Wakayama City Board of Education] {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Wakayama (city)]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Special Historic Sites of Japan in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳 (和歌山市)]] [[en:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳]] [[sn:ennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)}}

Drainage channels run from the chamber floor through the corridor, and scattered floor stones are present. burial goods found include beads, iron items, and Sue pottery, discovered during excavations in 1964 and 2017. == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Kii Fudoki-no-Oka Museum|ja|和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘|12=draft|12=draft}} (Wakayama City) - Exhibits burial goods from Tennōzuka Kofun. * {{ill|Wakayama City Museum|ja|和歌山市立博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} - Displays a replica of the stone chamber. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} * [http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun - Wakayama City Board of Education] {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Wakayama (city)]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Special Historic Sites of Japan in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳 (和歌山市)]] [[en:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳]] [[sn:ennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)}}

{{afc comment|1=See [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 天王塚古墳 |image = [[File:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
墳丘（手前に前方部、左奥に後円部） |alternate_name = 天王塚山古墳 |所属 = [[岩橋千塚古墳群]]（和佐地区） |location = [[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吉礼・下和佐 |coordinates = 34|coordinates = 13|coordinates = 24.37 |coordinates =135|coordinates = 14|coordinates = 16.41 |omitted = JP-30 |type = [[前方後円墳]] |area = 墳丘長88m
高さ10.1m（後円部） |Burial Facility = 両袖式[[横穴式石室]]
（岩橋型、石棚・石梁付） |burial goods = 玉類・鉄製品・[[須恵器]] |陪塚 = |built = [[6世紀]]中葉 |Interred Persons = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 国の[[特別史跡]]「岩橋千塚古墳群」に包含 |有形文化財 = |Special Notes = 和歌山県第1位のarea
石室高さは全国第2位 |地図 = Japan Wakayama |アイコン = 前方後円墳-西 |ラベル = 天王塚古墳 |ラベル位置 = bottom }} The '''Tennōzuka Kofun''' (天王塚古墳), also known as '''Tennōzuka-yama Kofun''' (天王塚山古墳), is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} (ancient Kofun) located in {{ill|Wakayama, Wakayama|ja|和歌山市|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|12=draft|12=draft}}. It has a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun (keyhole-shaped mound)|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} structure and is part of the {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} (Wasa area), a Historic Site1 {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is the largest kofun in Wakayama PrefectureMajor kofun in Wakayama Prefecture include: 1. '''Tennōzuka Kofun''' - 88m long (Wasa area). 2. {{ill|Kurakake no Koshikofun|ja|車駕之古址古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 86m long. 2. {{ill|Ōnichi-yama 35th Mound|ja|大日山35号墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 86m long (Iwase-Senzuka cluster). 4. {{ill|Ibe Hachimanyama Kofun|ja|井辺八幡山古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani-yama 22nd Mound|ja|大谷山22号墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani Kofun|ja|大谷古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. and was constructed around the mid-6th century during the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. It features one of the tallest {{ill|yokoana-shiki sekishitsu (horizontal stone chamber)|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}} in Japan.The tallest stone chamber in Japan is found in {{ill|Ōnokutsu Kofun|ja|大野窟古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} (Kumamoto), at 6.48m high. == Overview == Located atop Tennōzuka-yama (approx. 155m elevation) within the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster, Tennōzuka Kofun holds the distinction of being the largest mound and chamber in the cluster. Excavations were conducted in 1964 and from 2015 onwards.[http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun], Wakayama City Board of Education. The kofun is keyhole-shaped, oriented westward, with a two-tiered mound. It measures 88m in length, making it the largest in Wakayama Prefecture. No {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|12=draft|12=draft}}, or external structures have been found. The burial chamber is a double-sleeved horizontal stone chamber opening southward, characteristic of the Iwase style, with stone shelves and beams. The chamber height is an impressive 5.9m, ranking second in Japan. burial goods include {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft|12=draft}}, beads, glass ornaments, horse gear, and iron arrowheads. Estimated construction dates back to the mid-6th century. The map_size reflects the prominence of the {{ill|Ki clan|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造|12=draft|12=draft}} during that period. Designated as a {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡|12=draft|12=draft}} in 2016 as part of the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster.{{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} == burial Chamber == The stone chamber area are as follows: * Total Length: 10m * Main Chamber: 4.22m long, 2.89m wide, 5.9m high * Entrance Passage * Corridor Constructed with {{ill|schist|ja|結晶片岩|12=draft|12=draft}}, the chamber features stone shelves and eight stone beams. Drainage channels run from the chamber floor through the corridor, and scattered floor stones are present. burial goods found include beads, iron items, and Sue pottery, discovered during excavations in 1964 and 2017. == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Kii Fudoki-no-Oka Museum|ja|和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘|12=draft|12=draft}} (Wakayama City) - Exhibits burial goods from Tennōzuka Kofun. * {{ill|Wakayama City Museum|ja|和歌山市立博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} - Displays a replica of the stone chamber. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} * [http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun - Wakayama City Board of Education] {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Wakayama (city)]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Special Historic Sites of Japan in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳 (和歌山市)]] [[en:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳]] [[sn:ennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)}}

It has a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun (keyhole-shaped mound)|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} structure and is part of the {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} (Wasa area), a Historic Site1 {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is the largest kofun in Wakayama PrefectureMajor kofun in Wakayama Prefecture include: 1. '''Tennōzuka Kofun''' - 88m long (Wasa area). 2. {{ill|Kurakake no Koshikofun|ja|車駕之古址古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 86m long. 2. {{ill|Ōnichi-yama 35th Mound|ja|大日山35号墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 86m long (Iwase-Senzuka cluster). 4. {{ill|Ibe Hachimanyama Kofun|ja|井辺八幡山古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani-yama 22nd Mound|ja|大谷山22号墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani Kofun|ja|大谷古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. and was constructed around the mid-6th century during the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. It features one of the tallest {{ill|yokoana-shiki sekishitsu (horizontal stone chamber)|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}} in Japan.The tallest stone chamber in Japan is found in {{ill|Ōnokutsu Kofun|ja|大野窟古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} (Kumamoto), at 6.48m high. == Overview == Located atop Tennōzuka-yama (approx. 155m elevation) within the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster, Tennōzuka Kofun holds the distinction of being the largest mound and chamber in the cluster. Excavations were conducted in 1964 and from 2015 onwards.[http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun], Wakayama City Board of Education. The kofun is keyhole-shaped, oriented westward, with a two-tiered mound. It measures 88m in length, making it the largest in Wakayama Prefecture. No {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|12=draft|12=draft}}, or external structures have been found. The burial chamber is a double-sleeved horizontal stone chamber opening southward, characteristic of the Iwase style, with stone shelves and beams. The chamber height is an impressive 5.9m, Ranking second in Japan. burial goods include {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft|12=draft}}, beads, glass ornaments, horse gear, and iron arrowheads. Estimated construction dates back to the mid-6th century. The map_size reflects the prominence of the {{ill|Ki clan|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造|12=draft|12=draft}} during that period. Designated as a {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡|12=draft|12=draft}} in 2016 as part of the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster.{{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} == burial Chamber == The stone chamber area are as follows: * Total Length: 10m * Main Chamber: 4.22m long, 2.89m wide, 5.9m high * Entrance Passage * Corridor Constructed with {{ill|schist|ja|結晶片岩|12=draft|12=draft}}, the chamber features stone shelves and eight stone beams. Drainage channels run from the chamber floor through the corridor, and scattered floor stones are present. burial goods found include beads, iron items, and Sue pottery, discovered during excavations in 1964 and 2017. == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Kii Fudoki-no-Oka Museum|ja|和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘|12=draft|12=draft}} (Wakayama City) - Exhibits burial goods from Tennōzuka Kofun. * {{ill|Wakayama City Museum|ja|和歌山市立博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} - Displays a replica of the stone chamber. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} * [http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun - Wakayama City Board of Education] {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Wakayama (city)]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Special Historic Sites of Japan in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳 (和歌山市)]] [[en:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳]] [[sn:ennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)}}

Drainage channels run from the chamber floor through the corridor, and scattered floor stones are present. burial goods found include beads, iron items, and Sue pottery, discovered during excavations in 1964 and 2017. == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Kii Fudoki-no-Oka Museum|ja|和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘|12=draft|12=draft}} (Wakayama City) - Exhibits burial goods from Tennōzuka Kofun. * {{ill|Wakayama City Museum|ja|和歌山市立博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} - Displays a replica of the stone chamber. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} * [http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun - Wakayama City Board of Education] {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Wakayama (city)]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Special Historic Sites of Japan in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳 (和歌山市)]] [[en:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳]] [[sn:ennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)}}

{{afc comment|1=See [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 天王塚古墳 |image = [[File:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
墳丘（手前に前方部、左奥に後円部） |alternate_name = 天王塚山古墳 |所属 = [[岩橋千塚古墳群]]（和佐地区） |location = [[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吉礼・下和佐 |coordinates = 34|coordinates = 13|coordinates = 24.37 |coordinates =135|coordinates = 14|coordinates = 16.41 |omitted = JP-30 |type = [[前方後円墳]] |area = 墳丘長88m
高さ10.1m（後円部） |Burial Facility = 両袖式{{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}}
（岩橋型、石棚・石梁付） |burial goods = 玉類・鉄製品・[[須恵器]] |陪塚 = |built = [[6世紀]]中葉 |Interred Persons = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 国の[[特別史跡]]「岩橋千塚古墳群」に包含 |有形文化財 = |Special Notes = 和歌山県第1位のarea
石室高さは全国第2位 |地図 = Japan Wakayama |アイコン = 前方後円墳-西 |ラベル = 天王塚古墳 |ラベル位置 = bottom }} The '''Tennōzuka Kofun''' (天王塚古墳), also known as '''Tennōzuka-yama Kofun''' (天王塚山古墳), is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} (ancient Kofun) located in {{ill|Wakayama, Wakayama|ja|和歌山市|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|12=draft|12=draft}}. It has a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun (keyhole-shaped mound)|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} structure and is part of the {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} (Wasa area), a Historic Site1 {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is the largest kofun in Wakayama PrefectureMajor kofun in Wakayama Prefecture include: 1. '''Tennōzuka Kofun''' - 88m long (Wasa area). 2. {{ill|Kurakake no Koshikofun|ja|車駕之古址古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 86m long. 2. {{ill|Ōnichi-yama 35th Mound|ja|大日山35号墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 86m long (Iwase-Senzuka cluster). 4. {{ill|Ibe Hachimanyama Kofun|ja|井辺八幡山古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani-yama 22nd Mound|ja|大谷山22号墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. 4. {{ill|Ōtani Kofun|ja|大谷古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} - 70m long. and was constructed around the mid-6th century during the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. It features one of the tallest {{ill|yokoana-shiki sekishitsu (horizontal stone chamber)|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}} in Japan.The tallest stone chamber in Japan is found in {{ill|Ōnokutsu Kofun|ja|大野窟古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} (Kumamoto), at 6.48m high. == Overview == Located atop Tennōzuka-yama (approx. 155m elevation) within the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster, Tennōzuka Kofun holds the distinction of being the largest mound and chamber in the cluster. Excavations were conducted in 1964 and from 2015 onwards.[http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun], Wakayama City Board of Education. The kofun is keyhole-shaped, oriented westward, with a two-tiered mound. It measures 88m in length, making it the largest in Wakayama Prefecture. No {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|12=draft|12=draft}}, or external structures have been found. The burial chamber is a double-sleeved horizontal stone chamber opening southward, characteristic of the Iwase style, with stone shelves and beams. The chamber height is an impressive 5.9m, Ranking second in Japan. burial goods include {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft|12=draft}}, beads, glass ornaments, horse gear, and iron arrowheads. Estimated construction dates back to the mid-6th century. The map_size reflects the prominence of the {{ill|Ki clan|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造|12=draft|12=draft}} during that period. Designated as a {{ill|Special Historic Site of Japan|ja|特別史跡|12=draft|12=draft}} in 2016 as part of the Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster.{{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} == burial Chamber == The stone chamber area are as follows: * Total Length: 10m * Main Chamber: 4.22m long, 2.89m wide, 5.9m high * Entrance Passage * Corridor Constructed with {{ill|schist|ja|結晶片岩|12=draft|12=draft}}, the chamber features stone shelves and eight stone beams. Drainage channels run from the chamber floor through the corridor, and scattered floor stones are present. burial goods found include beads, iron items, and Sue pottery, discovered during excavations in 1964 and 2017. == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Kii Fudoki-no-Oka Museum|ja|和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘|12=draft|12=draft}} (Wakayama City) - Exhibits burial goods from Tennōzuka Kofun. * {{ill|Wakayama City Museum|ja|和歌山市立博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} - Displays a replica of the stone chamber. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster|ja|岩橋千塚古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|2070|Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster}} * [http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ Tennōzuka Kofun - Wakayama City Board of Education] {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Iwase-Senzuka Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Wakayama (city)]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Special Historic Sites of Japan in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳 (和歌山市)]] [[en:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] [[ja:天王塚古墳]] [[sn:ennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)}}

墳丘（手前に前方部、左奥に後円部） |別名 = 天王塚山古墳 |所属 = [[岩橋千塚古墳群]]（和佐地区） |所在地 = [[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吉礼・下和佐 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 13|緯度秒 = 24.37 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 14|経度秒 = 16.41 |ISO = JP-30 |形状 = [[前方後円墳]] |規模 = 墳丘長88m
高さ10.1m（後円部） |埋葬施設 = 両袖式[[横穴式石室]]
（岩橋型、石棚・石梁付） |出土品 = 玉類・鉄製品・[[須恵器]] |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[6世紀]]中葉 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 国の[[特別史跡]]「岩橋千塚古墳群」に包含 |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = 和歌山県第1位の規模
石室高さは全国第2位 |地図 = Japan Wakayama |アイコン = 前方後円墳-西 |ラベル = 天王塚古墳 |ラベル位置 = bottom }} '''天王塚古墳'''（てんのうづかこふん、天王塚山古墳）は、[[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吉礼・下和佐にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[前方後円墳]]。[[岩橋千塚古墳群]]（国の[[特別史跡]]、うち和佐地区）を構成する古墳の1つ。 和歌山県では最大規模の古墳で和歌山県における主な古墳は次の通り {{Harv|発掘調査現地説明会資料|2015}}。 : 1. '''天王塚古墳'''（和歌山市吉礼・下和佐） - 墳丘長88メートル。岩橋千塚古墳群和佐地区。 : 2. [[車駕之古址古墳]]（和歌山市木ノ本） - 墳丘長86メートル。 : 2. [[大日山35号墳]]（和歌山市岩橋・井辺） - 墳丘長86メートル。岩橋千塚古墳群大日山地区。 : 4. [[井辺八幡山古墳]]（和歌山市井辺・森小手穂） - 墳丘長70メートル。岩橋千塚古墳群井辺前山地区。 : 4. [[大谷山22号墳]]（和歌山市岩橋・鳴神） - 墳丘長70メートル。岩橋千塚古墳群大谷山地区。 : 4. [[大谷古墳]]（和歌山市大谷） - 墳丘長70メートル。 、[[6世紀]]中葉（[[古墳時代]]後期）頃の築造と推定される。全国第2位の高さを測る[[横穴式石室]]を有する石室高さ全国第1位は[[大野窟古墳]]（熊本県八代郡氷川町）で、6.48メートルを測る {{Harv|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。。 == 概要 ==
{| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff;text-align:center;font-size:85%;" |+[[岩橋千塚古墳群]]の大首長墓系譜 !古墳名 !形状 !規模 !埋葬施設 !築造時期 |- |花山8号墳||[[帆立貝形古墳]]||墳丘長52m||粘土床||4c末 |- |花山10号墳||[[前方後円墳]]||墳丘長44m||粘土槨
竪穴式石室||5c前半 |- |花山6号墳||前方後円墳||墳丘長60m||横穴式石室||5c末 |- |[[大谷山22号墳]]||前方後円墳||墳丘長68m||岩橋型横穴式石室||6c前半 |- |[[大日山35号墳]]||前方後円墳||墳丘長86m||岩橋型横穴式石室||6c前半 |- |'''天王塚古墳'''||前方後円墳||墳丘長88m||岩橋型横穴式石室||6c中葉 |- |寺内57号墳||[[円墳]]||直径35-40m||岩橋型横穴式石室||6c後半 |- |[[井辺1号墳]]||[[方墳]]||一辺35m||岩橋型横穴式石室||6c末-7c初頭 |}
和歌山県北西部、[[紀の川]]河口部の[[和歌山平野]]の岩橋山塊に営造された[[岩橋千塚古墳群]]のうち、山塊最高所（天王塚山山頂、標高約155メートル）に築造された古墳で{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}、古墳群中では墳丘・石室とも最大規模である{{Sfn|和佐古墳群（平凡社）|1983}}。これまでに[[1964年]]（[[昭和]]39年）および[[2015年]]度（[[平成]]27年度）以降に発掘調査が実施されている{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 墳形は前方後円形で、前方部を西方向に向ける{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。墳丘は2段築成{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。墳丘長は88メートルを測り、和歌山県では最大規模になる{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。墳丘外表で[[葺石]]・[[埴輪]]は検出されておらず、[[造出]]・基壇等の外表施設も認められていない{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。埋葬施設は後円部における両袖式の[[横穴式石室]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。岩橋千塚古墳群に特徴的な岩橋型横穴式石室で、玄室に石棚・石梁を伴う。特に石室高さが5.9メートルと非常に高く、全国では第2位の規模になる。副葬品としては[[須恵器]]（TK10-MT85型式期）・玉類・ガラス小玉・馬具・鉄鏃などが検出されている[http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ 天王塚古墳]（和歌山市教育委員会「和歌山市の文化財」）。。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]]後期の[[6世紀]]中葉頃と推定される{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。当時は全国的にも大型古墳の築造が減少する時期であるため、築造の背景として古代豪族の[[紀伊国造|紀氏]]の繁栄の様子が指摘される{{Sfn|発掘調査現地説明会資料|2015}}。 古墳域は[[2016年]]（平成28年）に国の[[特別史跡]]に指定されている（特別史跡「岩橋千塚古墳群」に追加指定）{{国指定文化財等データベース|401|2070|岩橋千塚古墳群}}。 == 遺跡歴 == * [[1906年]]（[[明治]]39年）、徳川頼倫による調査{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。 * [[1907年]]（明治40年）、石室調査（[[東京帝国大学]]人類学教室の大野雲外）{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 * [[1908年]]（明治41年）、[[ニール・ゴードン・マンロー]]の"Prehistoric Japan"に石室図面掲載{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 * [[1912年]]（明治45年）の2ヶ月間、石室内部公開{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 * [[1964年]]（[[昭和]]39年）、発掘調査（和歌山市教育委員会・[[関西大学]]、[[1967年]]に報告書刊行）{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。 * [[2015年]]度（[[平成]]27年度）、史跡指定に向けた範囲確認測量・発掘調査：第1次調査（和歌山県教育委員会、[[2016年]]に報告書刊行）{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。 * 2016年（平成28年） ** 2月1日、遺跡名称を「天王塚山古墳」から「天王塚古墳」に変更{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016}}。 ** 10月3日、国の[[特別史跡]]に指定（特別史跡「[[岩橋千塚古墳群]]」に追加指定）[https://web.archive.org/web/20160622173820/http://www.bunka.go.jp/koho_hodo_oshirase/hodohappyo/2016061701.html 史跡等の指定等について]（文化庁報道発表、2016年6月17日）。。 * [[2017年|2017]]-[[2018年]]度（平成29-30年度）、史跡整備に向けた発掘調査：第2・3次調査（[[和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘]]・和歌山県教育委員会、[[2020年]]に報告書刊行）{{Sfn|天王塚古墳 2次・3次発掘調査報告書|2020}}{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 == 墳丘 == 墳丘の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 * 墳丘長：88メートル * 後円部 - 2段築成。 ** 直径：約44-48メートル ** 高さ：10.1メートル * 前方部 - 2段築成。 墳丘の構築は、1段目の大部分においては岩盤整形により、2段目以上においては盛土による{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。盛土は地山の削り出しによるとされ、盛土中に[[弥生時代]]の土器・石器が認められることから、山頂付近では弥生時代に集落が存在したと推測される{{Sfn|発掘調査現地説明会資料|2015}}。また墳丘全体として[[葺石]]・[[造出]]・基壇・周濠・[[埴輪]]を伴わないという、時代が下る時期の特色を示す{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), kouenbu.jpg|前方部から後円部を望む Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), zenpoubu.jpg|後円部側から前方部を望む Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), funkyu-trench-2.jpg|後円部墳丘トレンチ
{{small|2018年調査時。墳丘下半では岩盤整形が認められる。}} == 埋葬施設 == [[File:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), replica 3D-B.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石室レプリカ俯瞰図}}]] [[File:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), replica 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石室レプリカ展開図}}]] 埋葬施設としては、後円部において両袖式[[横穴式石室]]が構築されており、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。石室の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|和佐古墳群（平凡社）|1983}}。 * 石室全長：10メートル * 玄室：長さ4.22メートル、幅2.89メートル、高さ5.9メートル * 玄室前道（通廊） * 羨道 石室の石材は[[結晶片岩]]{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。玄室には石棚（1箇所2枚）・石梁8本を伴い、岩橋千塚古墳群で特徴的な岩橋型横穴式石室になる{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。玄室は岩盤上に構築され、岩盤床面では中央部・両側壁側に排水溝が構築される{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。この排水溝は羨道を通って墳丘外まで続く{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。また玄室床面には板石が散在する{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 石室内は盗掘に遭っているが、1964年（昭和39年）調査および2017年度（平成29年度）調査の際に、石室内の副葬品として玉類・鉄製品・須恵器などが検出されている{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), genshitsu-1.jpg|玄室 奥壁
{{small|中央に石棚2枚、上に石梁1本。2018年調査時。}} Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), genshitsu-2.jpg|玄室 上方
{{small|最奥に天井石。手前の左右側壁に多くの石梁を渡す。}} Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), genmon.jpg|玄室 玄門
{{small|奥に玄室前道・羨道。2018年調査時。}} Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), sendou.jpg|羨道
{{small|奥に玄室前道・玄室。2018年調査時。}} Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), senmon.jpg|羨門
{{small|2018年調査時。}} 天王塚古墳 (和歌山市) 出土品 (紀伊風土記の丘展示2023).JPG|出土品
{{small|[[和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘]]企画展示時に撮影。}} 伝天王塚古墳 (和歌山市) 出土 須恵器 有蓋台付壺.JPG|伝出土 須恵器 有蓋台付壺
{{small|和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘展示。}} 天王塚古墳 (和歌山市) 出土 玉類.JPG|玉類
{{small|和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘企画展示時に撮影。}} == 関連施設 == * [[和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘]]（和歌山市岩橋） - 天王塚古墳の出土品を保管・展示。 * [[和歌山市立博物館]]（和歌山市湊本町） - 天王塚古墳の石室レプリカを展示。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} '''注釈''' {{reflist|group="注"}} '''出典''' {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * 地方自治体発行 ** 発掘調査報告書 *** {{Cite book|和書|editor=[[関西大学]]文学部考古学研究室|author=|year=1967|chapter=|title=岩橋千塚|publisher=和歌山市教育委員会|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|岩橋千塚|1967}}}} *** {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2016|chapter=|title=大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳 -特別史跡岩橋千塚古墳群追加指定に伴う発掘調査報告書-|publisher=和歌山県教育委員会|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016}}}} *** {{Cite book|和書|editor=和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘|author=|year=2020|chapter=|title=特別史跡 岩橋千塚古墳群 -天王塚古墳 2次・3次発掘調査報告書-|publisher=和歌山県教育委員会|url=https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/139273|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|天王塚古墳 2次・3次発掘調査報告書|2020}}}} - リンクは奈良文化財研究所「全国遺跡報告総覧」。 ** 現地説明会資料 *** {{Wikicite|reference={{PDFlink|[http://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/haihu.pdf 天王塚山古墳発掘調査現地説明会資料]}}（和歌山県庁生涯学習局文化遺産課、2015年）|ref={{Harvid|発掘調査現地説明会資料|2015}}}} - リンクは和歌山県ホームページ。 *** {{Wikicite|reference={{PDFlink|[http://www.kiifudoki.wakayama-c.ed.jp/gennsetu/gennsetusiryou.pdf 天王塚古墳第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料]}}（和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘、2018年）|ref={{Harvid|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}}} - リンクは紀伊風土記の丘ホームページ。 * 事典類 ** {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1983|chapter=和佐古墳群|title=和歌山県の地名|series=[[日本歴史地名大系]]31|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=458249031X|ref={{Harvid|和佐古墳群（平凡社）|1983}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=丹野拓・米田文孝|year=2018|chapter=|title=紀国造家の実像をさぐる 岩橋千塚古墳群|series=シリーズ「遺跡を学ぶ」126|publisher=新泉社|isbn=9784787718365|ref=}} == 外部リンク== {{Commonscat|Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama)}} * {{国指定文化財等データベース|401|2070|岩橋千塚古墳群}} * [http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ 天王塚古墳] - 和歌山市教育委員会「和歌山市の文化財」 {{デフォルトソート:てんのうつかこふん わかやまし}} [[Category:岩橋千塚古墳群]] [[Category:和歌山県の古墳]] [[Category:和歌山市の歴史]] [[Category:前方後円墳]] [[Category:和歌山県にある国指定の史跡]]

revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称 = 天王塚古墳 |画像 = [[File:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
墳丘（手前に前方部、左奥に後円部） |別名 = 天王塚山古墳 |所属 = [[岩橋千塚古墳群]]（和佐地区） |所在地 = [[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吉礼・下和佐 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 13|緯度秒 = 24.37 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 14|経度秒 = 16.41 |ISO = JP-30 |形状 = [[前方後円墳]] |規模 = 墳丘長88m
高さ10.1m（後円部） |埋葬施設 = 両袖式[[横穴式石室]]
（岩橋型、石棚・石梁付） |出土品 = 玉類・鉄製品・[[須恵器]] |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[6世紀]]中葉 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 国の[[特別史跡]]「岩橋千塚古墳群」に包含 |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = 和歌山県第1位の規模
石室高さは全国第2位 |地図 = Japan Wakayama |アイコン = 前方後円墳-西 |ラベル = 天王塚古墳 |ラベル位置 = bottom }} '''天王塚古墳'''（てんのうづかこふん、天王塚山古墳）は、[[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吉礼・下和佐にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[前方後円墳]]。[[岩橋千塚古墳群]]（国の[[特別史跡]]、うち和佐地区）を構成する古墳の1つ。 和歌山県では最大規模の古墳で和歌山県における主な古墳は次の通り {{Harv|発掘調査現地説明会資料|2015}}。 : 1. '''天王塚古墳'''（和歌山市吉礼・下和佐） - 墳丘長88メートル。岩橋千塚古墳群和佐地区。 : 2. [[車駕之古址古墳]]（和歌山市木ノ本） - 墳丘長86メートル。 : 2. [[大日山35号墳]]（和歌山市岩橋・井辺） - 墳丘長86メートル。岩橋千塚古墳群大日山地区。 : 4. [[井辺八幡山古墳]]（和歌山市井辺・森小手穂） - 墳丘長70メートル。岩橋千塚古墳群井辺前山地区。 : 4. [[大谷山22号墳]]（和歌山市岩橋・鳴神） - 墳丘長70メートル。岩橋千塚古墳群大谷山地区。 : 4. [[大谷古墳]]（和歌山市大谷） - 墳丘長70メートル。 、[[6世紀]]中葉（[[古墳時代]]後期）頃の築造と推定される。全国第2位の高さを測る[[横穴式石室]]を有する石室高さ全国第1位は[[大野窟古墳]]（熊本県八代郡氷川町）で、6.48メートルを測る {{Harv|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。。 == 概要 ==
{| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff;text-align:center;font-size:85%;" |+[[岩橋千塚古墳群]]の大首長墓系譜 !古墳名 !形状 !規模 !埋葬施設 !築造時期 |- |花山8号墳||[[帆立貝形古墳]]||墳丘長52m||粘土床||4c末 |- |花山10号墳||[[前方後円墳]]||墳丘長44m||粘土槨
竪穴式石室||5c前半 |- |花山6号墳||前方後円墳||墳丘長60m||横穴式石室||5c末 |- |[[大谷山22号墳]]||前方後円墳||墳丘長68m||岩橋型横穴式石室||6c前半 |- |[[大日山35号墳]]||前方後円墳||墳丘長86m||岩橋型横穴式石室||6c前半 |- |'''天王塚古墳'''||前方後円墳||墳丘長88m||岩橋型横穴式石室||6c中葉 |- |寺内57号墳||[[円墳]]||直径35-40m||岩橋型横穴式石室||6c後半 |- |[[井辺1号墳]]||[[方墳]]||一辺35m||岩橋型横穴式石室||6c末-7c初頭 |}
和歌山県北西部、[[紀の川]]河口部の[[和歌山平野]]の岩橋山塊に営造された[[岩橋千塚古墳群]]のうち、山塊最高所（天王塚山山頂、標高約155メートル）に築造された古墳で{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}、古墳群中では墳丘・石室とも最大規模である{{Sfn|和佐古墳群（平凡社）|1983}}。これまでに[[1964年]]（[[昭和]]39年）および[[2015年]]度（[[平成]]27年度）以降に発掘調査が実施されている{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 墳形は前方後円形で、前方部を西方向に向ける{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。墳丘は2段築成{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。墳丘長は88メートルを測り、和歌山県では最大規模になる{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。墳丘外表で[[葺石]]・[[埴輪]]は検出されておらず、[[造出]]・基壇等の外表施設も認められていない{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。埋葬施設は後円部における両袖式の[[横穴式石室]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。岩橋千塚古墳群に特徴的な岩橋型横穴式石室で、玄室に石棚・石梁を伴う。特に石室高さが5.9メートルと非常に高く、全国では第2位の規模になる。副葬品としては[[須恵器]]（TK10-MT85型式期）・玉類・ガラス小玉・馬具・鉄鏃などが検出されている[http://wakayamacity-bunkazai.jp/iseki/6512/ 天王塚古墳]（和歌山市教育委員会「和歌山市の文化財」）。。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]]後期の[[6世紀]]中葉頃と推定される{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。当時は全国的にも大型古墳の築造が減少する時期であるため、築造の背景として古代豪族の[[紀伊国造|紀氏]]の繁栄の様子が指摘される{{Sfn|発掘調査現地説明会資料|2015}}。 古墳域は[[2016年]]（平成28年）に国の[[特別史跡]]に指定されている（特別史跡「岩橋千塚古墳群」に追加指定）{{国指定文化財等データベース|401|2070|岩橋千塚古墳群}}。 == 遺跡歴 == * [[1906年]]（[[明治]]39年）、徳川頼倫による調査{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。 * [[1907年]]（明治40年）、石室調査（[[東京帝国大学]]人類学教室の大野雲外）{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 * [[1908年]]（明治41年）、[[ニール・ゴードン・マンロー]]の"Prehistoric Japan"に石室図面掲載{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 * [[1912年]]（明治45年）の2ヶ月間、石室内部公開{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 * [[1964年]]（[[昭和]]39年）、発掘調査（和歌山市教育委員会・[[関西大学]]、[[1967年]]に報告書刊行）{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。 * [[2015年]]度（[[平成]]27年度）、史跡指定に向けた範囲確認測量・発掘調査：第1次調査（和歌山県教育委員会、[[2016年]]に報告書刊行）{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。 * 2016年（平成28年） ** 2月1日、遺跡名称を「天王塚山古墳」から「天王塚古墳」に変更{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016}}。 ** 10月3日、国の[[特別史跡]]に指定（特別史跡「[[岩橋千塚古墳群]]」に追加指定）[https://web.archive.org/web/20160622173820/http://www.bunka.go.jp/koho_hodo_oshirase/hodohappyo/2016061701.html 史跡等の指定等について]（文化庁報道発表、2016年6月17日）。。 * [[2017年|2017]]-[[2018年]]度（平成29-30年度）、史跡整備に向けた発掘調査：第2・3次調査（[[和歌山県立紀伊風土記の丘]]・和歌山県教育委員会、[[2020年]]に報告書刊行）{{Sfn|天王塚古墳 2次・3次発掘調査報告書|2020}}{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 == 墳丘 == 墳丘の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 * 墳丘長：88メートル * 後円部 - 2段築成。 ** 直径：約44-48メートル ** 高さ：10.1メートル * 前方部 - 2段築成。 墳丘の構築は、1段目の大部分においては岩盤整形により、2段目以上においては盛土による{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。盛土は地山の削り出しによるとされ、盛土中に[[弥生時代]]の土器・石器が認められることから、山頂付近では弥生時代に集落が存在したと推測される{{Sfn|発掘調査現地説明会資料|2015}}。また墳丘全体として[[葺石]]・[[造出]]・基壇・周濠・[[埴輪]]を伴わないという、時代が下る時期の特色を示す{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), kouenbu.jpg|前方部から後円部を望む Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), zenpoubu.jpg|後円部側から前方部を望む Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), funkyu-trench-2.jpg|後円部墳丘トレンチ
{{small|2018年調査時。墳丘下半では岩盤整形が認められる。}} == 埋葬施設 == [[File:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), replica 3D-B.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石室レプリカ俯瞰図}}]] [[File:Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), replica 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石室レプリカ展開図}}]] 埋葬施設としては、後円部において両袖式[[横穴式石室]]が構築されており、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|大谷山22号墳、天王塚古墳|2016|pp=35-48}}。石室の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|和佐古墳群（平凡社）|1983}}。 * 石室全長：10メートル * 玄室：長さ4.22メートル、幅2.89メートル、高さ5.9メートル * 玄室前道（通廊） * 羨道 石室の石材は[[結晶片岩]]{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。玄室には石棚（1箇所2枚）・石梁8本を伴い、岩橋千塚古墳群で特徴的な岩橋型横穴式石室になる{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。玄室は岩盤上に構築され、岩盤床面では中央部・両側壁側に排水溝が構築される{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。この排水溝は羨道を通って墳丘外まで続く{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。また玄室床面には板石が散在する{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 石室内は盗掘に遭っているが、1964年（昭和39年）調査および2017年度（平成29年度）調査の際に、石室内の副葬品として玉類・鉄製品・須恵器などが検出されている{{Sfn|第2次発掘調査現地説明会資料|2018}}。 Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), genshitsu-1.jpg|玄室 奥壁
{{small|中央に石棚2枚、上に石梁1本。2018年調査時。}} Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), genshitsu-2.jpg|玄室 上方
{{small|最奥に天井石。手前の左右側壁に多くの石梁を渡す。}} Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), genmon.jpg|玄室 玄門
{{small|奥に玄室前道・羨道。2018年調査時。}} Tennozuka Kofun (Wakayama), sendou.jpg|羨道
